description: Published numbers extracted from papers for Agent X-Ray literature mode. All GSM8K unless noted. Executor model gpt-4o-mini in both sources.

maas_table3_math_inference.note: MATH benchmark, accuracy vs inference cost

audit_observations: AFlow's GSM8K gain over plain IO is +0.8pp in its own Table 1 (93.5 vs 92.7); CoT-SC(5) already matches IO exactly.
Same model, same benchmark: AFlow paper says IO=92.7, MaAS paper says Vanilla=87.45 — a 5.3pp baseline discrepancy between papers.
AFlow's replication of ADAS scores BELOW plain IO on 6-bench average (67.2 vs 72.8).
MaAS's own text: AFlow/ADAS improve over vanilla by 'only 3.35% and 2.04% on average' on GAIA.
None of the tables report variance/CIs for these <1-3pp margins; AFlow tests 3 times and reports the average, MaAS temperature=1.
